description_long: This is a wooden platform bed with a rectangular frame and a solid headboard. The bed features a thick, geometric-patterned mattress in shades of white, gray, and black, topped with two white pillows. The frame is constructed from a medium-brown wood with visible grain, giving it a sturdy and rustic appearance. The headboard is flat and extends the full width of the bed, while the foot of the bed is open with no footboard. The mattress appears plush and slightly raised above the frame, and the bedding is minimal, consisting of a single patterned cover. The overall design is modern yet functional, suitable for urban interiors or loft-style settings.
description: A sturdy wooden platform bed with a geometric-patterned mattress and two white pillows, featuring a solid headboard and minimalist bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid wooden headboard, two white pillows, and the full patterned mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the platform frame, and the headboard's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid wooden headboard and the bed's rectangular structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mattress, pillows, and the open foot of the bed with no footboard.
